summary: Backend testing complete for iteration 31: Download Links Grouping & Dynamic Media Types. All 29 tests passed. Verified: (1) GET /api/download-links/media-types returns dynamic ['movie', 'tv'] sorted, PUBLIC endpoint, (2) GET /api/download-links with default group=True returns 3003 grouped items (vs 15237 raw rows), (3) group=false returns raw 15237 rows, (4) Grouped items have all required fields: group_type, episode_count, episode_range, episode_min, episode_max, qualities[], languages[], uploaders_count, latest_created_at, earliest_created_at, (5) TV episodes grouped by (tmdb_id, season_number) with episode_range like 'E1-3', (6) Movies stay individual with group_type='movie', (7) Filters work with grouping (uploader, media_type), (8) Pagination works on grouped results, (9) Cache working (2s first request, 0.1s cached), (10) Security headers present, no credential leakage.
passed_tests: GET /api/download-links/media-types returns list with types ['movie', 'tv']
GET /api/download-links/media-types is PUBLIC (no auth required)
GET /api/download-links/media-types types are sorted alphabetically
No Supabase credentials leak in media-types response
GET /api/download-links?limit=5 default returns grouped=true
Grouped total=3003 (not 15237 raw rows)
GET /api/download-links?group=false returns raw rows total=15237
Grouped items have all required fields: group_type, episode_count, episode_range, episode_min, episode_max, qualities, languages, uploaders_count, latest_created_at, earliest_created_at
group_type values are 'tv_season' or 'movie'
TV season groups have valid episode info (episode_count >= 1, episode_range like 'E1-3')
Episode range format correct (E1-3 for consecutive episodes)
qualities field is array of unique qualities
languages field is array of unique languages
uploaders_count is integer >= 1
Movies stay individual with group_type='movie'
Filter by uploader=IMPERIUM works with grouping
Filter by media_type=movie returns only movies (group_type='movie')
Filter by media_type=tv returns only TV groups (group_type='tv_season')
Pagination works on grouped results (page 1 and 2 have different items)
has_more flag correct for pagination
Sort by created_at.desc works with grouping
Sort by quality.desc works with grouping
Cache makes second request fast (~2s first, ~0.1s cached)
GET /api/download-links/recent still deduplicates by (tmdb_id, media_type)
No Supabase credentials leak in download-links response
Security headers present (X-Frame-Options=DENY, X-Content-Type-Options=nosniff)
Non-existent uploader filter returns empty (total=0)
Explicit group=false returns ungrouped data
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Supabase WWembed data (15237 total links, 3003 groups)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 backend features validated: Download Links Grouping & Dynamic Media Types. Key changes: (1) NEW endpoint GET /api/download-links/media-types returns dynamic ['movie', 'tv'] from Supabase, sorted, PUBLIC. (2) GET /api/download-links now defaults to group=True - TV episodes from same (tmdb_id, season_number) merged into one entry. Grouped total=3003 vs raw total=15237. (3) Grouped items have: group_type ('tv_season'|'movie'), episode_count, episode_range (compressed like 'E1-3, E5, E7'), episode_min, episode_max, qualities[], languages[], uploaders_count, latest_created_at, earliest_created_at. (4) group=false returns raw ungrouped rows. (5) 30s cache with key based on filters+group flag. (6) /api/download-links/recent unchanged (still deduplicates for home slider).
